title: ShowModel Property
description: The ShowModel property allows a previously taught model to be displayed at various zoom settings.
notes:
Correlation and Geometric Objects:

You can zoom the model and change the model origin with mouse or arrow keys.

The ShowModel property is available from the property list of Vision Guide.

The user clicks on the value field of the ShowModel property which causes a button to appear in the Value field. Click the button and the model will be displayed in the Vision Guide window.

Changing the Model Origin

This allows you to set the model origin more accurately.  A check box is provided so that ModelOrgAutoCenter can be toggled.  When ModelOrgAutoCenter is set to on, the model origin is centered and cannot be changed.

To change the model origin with the mouse, make sure that the ModelOrgAutoCenter check box is off.

Then point to the center of the cross, and click the mouse down. Now drag the cross to the desired position.

Click OK to save the new model origin settings.

Polar Objects:

The model can be zoomed. The ModelOrgAutoCenter check box is hidden, since it does not apply in this case. Also, there is a Close button instead of OK and Cancel.

The ShowModel property is available from the Vision Guide window Object tab.

The user clicks on the value field of the ShowModel property which causes a button to appear in the Value field.  Click on the button and the model will be displayed in the Vision Guide window.

Button	Tool tip:
		 Brief description

Position model origin: Changes the
		 model origin.  When ModelOrgAutoCenter property is "True",
		 the model origin is fixed with centering state and cannot be changed.

To change the model origin using a mouse,
		 make sure that ModelOrgAutoCenter property is "False". Click on
		 the center of the cross with a mouse and drag to the position
		 to be set.

Click the [OK] button to set a new model
		 origin.

Paint don't care pixels: Click this
		 button to paint don't care pixels freely. When moving a pointer
		 to a paint area, the pointer mark will change to "□". Drag the
		 points where you want to set don't care pixels. The size of "□"
		 can be changed on the edit toolbar.

Rectangle: Paints don't care pixels
		 with a rectangle.

Ellipse: Paints don't care pixels
		 with an ellipse.

Erase don't care pixels: Click this
		 button to delete don't care pixels partly. When moving a pointer
		 to a paint area, the pointer mark will change to "□". Drag the
		 points where you want to delete don't care pixels. The size of
		 "□" can be changed on the edit toolbar.

Erase all don't care pixels: Click
		 this button to deletes all don't care pixels.

Transparent don't care pixels: Selects
		 whether to make don't care pixels to semi-transparent or non-transparent.

For Correlation and Geometric objects

Position model origin, Paint don't care pixels, and Erase are available.

For Polar and DefectFinder objects

Position model origin button and the field of ModelOrgAutoCenter will not be displayed.

Paint don't care pixels and Erase are available.

For Contour object

Position model origin button, the field of ModelOrgAutoCenter, and the edit tool bar will not be displayed.
see_also:
Designtime only

Applies To
